top_signals.title: Thames Water warns over long-term future
top_signals.summary: Utility says it can survive 12 months but cautions that liquidity may fall short before recapitalisation

top_signals.title: MOLLE, PALS, and the Empty Loops of America’s Civil-Military Divide
top_signals.summary:
Editor’s note: This is the third article in a limited series celebrating American defense technologies born from wartime and their effects on broader national security, politics, and society. This series will run for several weeks to commemorate America’s 250th anniversary, and winners will be selected by a reader vote undertaken through our newsletter later this summer. Prior installments can be found at the Arsenal of Innovation page. In the half-century since the Gates Commission established the all-volunteer force — and especially over the last 25 years — the relationship between the American soldier and the state has changed profoundly. top_signals.title: The AI boom just found two new winners: Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan showed that Wall Street is a major beneficiary of the AI boom, with record revenue driven by surging trading and investment banking.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: How Asset Managers Are Investing in Crypto
top_signals.summary: Asset managers invest in crypto mainly through regulated products: spot ETFs, digital asset funds, tokenized funds, qualified custodians, and blockchain company equity. Most invest on behalf of clients rather than for their own accounts. Their aim is to deliver digital asset exposure inside the brokerage, retirement, and advisory structures clients already use, with the custody, […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin vs Gold as a Reserve Asset
top_signals.summary: A reserve asset is something an institution or government holds to preserve value, provide liquidity, and act as a store of wealth outside its day-to-day operating currency. Bitcoin and gold are both treated as reserve assets because each is scarce, hard to counterfeit, and independent of any single company’s performance. Gold has filled that role […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US, UK treasuries to align transatlantic rules on tokenization and stablecoins
top_signals.summary: The two governments issued recommendations on the treatment of digital assets as the US prepares to implement a 2025 law on payment stablecoins.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: BulkLoads expands ag freight footprint with Livestock Network acquisition
top_signals.summary:
BulkLoads has acquired Livestock Network, adding the livestock-focused load board and online community to its freight marketplace.

top_signals.title: UK’s biggest pub firm probed over treatment of tenants
top_signals.summary: The UK’s biggest pub landlord is being probed by the industry watchdog over concerns that it is mistreating its tenants.  Stonegate, whose 4,500 UK sites include the Cannick Taps on Cannon Street and the Cheshire Cheese on Tower Hill, is facing an investigation from the Pubs Code Adjudicator (PCA).  The watchdog said it had “reasonable [...]

top_signals.title: Ark Invest adds $14 million in Circle shares while selling Robinhood
top_signals.summary: Ark Invest bought $14 million worth of Circle and $1.5 million worth of Block Inc., while selling $3.2 million worth of Robinhood.
